title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Lendingkart Capital India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Lendingkart Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Lendingkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
